metadata.description: Large current-format payload sourced from the Zomato delivery dataset for baseline allocation runs without using the dataset's distance field.
metadata.name: Zomato Clear Weather Large (172 orders)
metadata.recommended_for: High-volume baseline allocation demos, score inspection, and on_time_rate walkthroughs.
metadata.scenario: Large clear-weather allocation slice generated from Sunny, Cloudy, and Windy Zomato rows.
